I'll start by reading the file to understand its current content.

Now let me reason through the fixes:

### Fix 1: `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants`
- Line 4: `TextVariants` is imported from `@patternfly/react-core`
- It's used on lines 10, 15, 18 as `TextVariants.p`
- Need to rename to `ContentVariants` and update all references
- The member mapping confirms `p -> p`, so `ContentVariants.p` is correct

### Fix 2: `Text` → `Content`
- Line 4: `Text` is imported from `@patternfly/react-core`
- It's used as a JSX component on lines 10, 14, 15, 17, 18, 21
- The property mapping shows all props (`className`, `component`, `children`) map directly to `Content`
- Need to replace `<Text ...>` with `<Content ...>` and `</Text>` with `</Content>`
- Update the import to `Content` instead of `Text`

Both fixes affect the same import line 4. The combined result should be:
```
import { Content, ContentVariants } from '@patternfly/react-core';
```

And all JSX `<Text` → `<Content`, `</Text>` → `</Content>`, `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants`.

arguments.after:
<Content className="text-muted" component={ContentVariants.p}>
        {t(
          'Set scheduling requirements and affect the ranking of the Node candidates for scheduling.',
        )}
      </Content>
      <Content className="text-muted" component={ContentVariants.p}>
        {t('Rules with "Preferred" condition will stack with an "AND" relation between them.')}
      </Content>
      <Content className="text-muted" component={ContentVariants.p}>
        {t('Rules with "Required" condition will stack with an "OR" relation between them.')}
      </Content>
arguments.before:
<Text className="text-muted" component={TextVariants.p}>
        {t(
          'Set scheduling requirements and affect the ranking of the Node candidates for scheduling.',
        )}
      </Text>

        {t('Rules with "Preferred" condition will stack with an "AND" relation between them.')}
      </Text>
      <Text className="text-muted" component={TextVariants.p}>
        {t('Rules with "Required" condition will stack with an "OR" relation between them.')}
      </Text>

content.text: Let me verify the final file:

The file looks correct. All changes have been applied cleanly.

## Changes Applied

1. **Fix 1** (`TextVariants` → `ContentVariants`): **Applied.** Renamed `TextVariants` to `ContentVariants` in the import (line 4) and all three JSX usages (`TextVariants.p` → `ContentVariants.p` on lines 10, 15, 18).

2. **Fix 2** (`Text` → `Content`): **Applied.** Renamed `Text` to `Content` in the import (line 4) and all six JSX tags (`<Text` → `<Content` and `</Text>` → `</Content>` on lines 10, 14, 15, 17, 18, 20).

No remaining dead imports or unused references. The file is consistent and preserves the original behavior with the migrated PatternFly v6 API.
